title: Lifewit 15L (24 Cans) Insulated Lunch Bag, Cooler Bag for Lunch/Work/School/Beach/Picnic (Black)
features: Thermal Insulated: The lunch bag is made of insulated material which can keep food and drinks cool or warm for more than 4.5 hours. Besides, the interior lining is made of food grade PEVA foil so you can put your food into the bag directly without any worry. The built-in 2 mm EPE foam provides great protection to your containers, food and drinks.

LARGE CAPACITY: Size - 30cm × 23cm × 23cm The maximum capacity of this lunch bag for adults is 15L, it is spacious enough to store 24 cans of coke (330ml) or your lunch: sandwiches, salad, snacks, drinks and fruits, etc. It is suitable for office, work, picnic, beach, travel.

WATERPROOF & WATERPROOF: The exterior of this lunch box for men is constructed of 600D oxford fabric which is water and dirt resistant for durability and waterproof and easy cleaning. Even filled with water and ice, it keeps fruit and drinks well and does not leak at all.

Durable material: The lining of this insulated lunch box is made of PEVA sheet that resists dirt and wear and will not melt easily even with hot food. High quality strong zippers will minimize the possibility of breaking. Perfect for your office and picnic food storage needs.

CONVENIENT & PORTABLE: The lid of this cooler can open wide with strong two-way zippers, which means you can put your lunch container in the bag and take it out horizontally. Sturdy handles and shoulder strap allow you to carry it easily. In addition, the additional pockets on the front and side can hold small items like keys or headphones.
